# Contributing

Contributions, bug reports, and feature requests are welcome through [issues](https://github.com/SysAdminDoc/SysAdminDoc/issues/new/choose).

## Profile README Changes

The public `README.md` is generated by `scripts/sync-profile.ps1`. Do not edit it directly; submit catalog or script changes instead.

## Before Submitting

- Run `.\scripts\sync-profile.ps1 -Check` locally to verify nothing regresses.
- Keep commits focused and conventional (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`).
- Do not include private repository names, medical data, or employer-specific details in any public content.
